HGSS.356.0000:
Misty: Aww! Why did you have to
show up and bug us now?\f
Do you know what they call people
like you?\f
Pests! You heard me right, pest!\f
...\f
...Oh? Those Badges you have...
Are they Johto Gym Badges?\f
If you have eight, you must be good.\f
OK, then. Come to Cerulean Gym.
I’ll be happy to take you on.\f
I’m Misty, the Gym Leader
in Cerulean.\f
HGSS.356.0001:
Misty: I love the sunset here!
It gives me courage to go on, you know?\f
Right!\f
Why don’t we exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.356.0003:
Misty: Give me a call on Wednesday
morning if you want another\r
battle with me!
HGSS.356.0005:
Misty: So you do want to know
my number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.356.0006:
Misty: Ah! You have a cool
Water-type Pokémon!\r
Can I take a picture with it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.356.0007:
Misty: Way to go!\f
Let’s see a big smile!\f
HGSS.356.0008:
Misty: We look good!
I really like Water-type Pokémon!
HGSS.356.0010:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.356.0011:
You took on one more battle than
you expected, but you won anyway.\f
As promised, you win a prize.\f
HGSS.356.0013:
But after seeing how you battle,
I want to see how I’ll fare.\r
How about it? Let me take you on.\f
HGSS.356.0014:
I’ve never had a battle this
wonderful!\f
You and your Pokémon are
really strong!
HGSS.356.0016:
Eusine: Puff, puff...
I am...no match for you.\r
...As I predicted.\f
..................
...Go ahead.\f
Since I met you in the Burned Tower
at Ecruteak City, I’ve sort of known\r
that SUICUNE would choose you.\f
HGSS.356.0017:
Eusine: Take a look at it!
SUICUNE is waiting for you!\r
It has been waiting for a battle\r
with a worthy Trainer to whom\r
it can entrust itself!
HGSS.356.0018:
Eusine: [0103,0000,0000]...
You two are truly amazing...\f
I have never seen a battle
this intense!\r
I have no regrets...\f
Farewell, SUICUNE!
Farewell...[0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.356.0019:
Eusine: [0103,0000,0000]...
There is nothing to be ashamed of.\f
No one can pick on you just because
you ran from SUICUNE.\f
It’s just that SUICUNE is such an
amazing Pokémon. That’s all.\r
Anyway, SUICUNE is gone again.\r
It’s back to square one...\f
